title: Support Diagnostics Command Deck
concept: A dense support diagnostics console that keeps the live WordPress shell protected while status, logs, database details, transfer history, launch contracts, save destinations, and destructive management flows mutate one active Playground object.
focus: dense command deck with readable accelerators
database, logs, and transfer history prominence
flows: Delete the active saved Playground end to end with warning, cancel option, typed confirmation, progress, row removal, transfer history, and fallback to an Unsaved Playground in the live shell
Preview a Gutenberg PR or branch end to end with route-specific input, validation, loading, resulting preview identity, path mutation, saved row mutation, and save/export availability

Save the active Playground in browser storage or to a local directory with distinct destination consequences, folder permission state, progress, active identity mutation, and saved management row updates
Create or import using Vanilla WordPress, WordPress PR, Gutenberg PR or branch, GitHub import with account connection, Blueprint URL, and ZIP import with real inputs and constraints
Use Site Manager Settings, Files, Blueprint, Database, Logs, Export to GitHub, and Download as zip while the live preview remains visible
Inspect database driver, SQLite path and size, download database.sqlite, open Adminer and phpMyAdmin, and record the results in diagnostics history
Browse a labeled representative subset of the 43 Blueprint gallery entries with categories, search, selected detail, Blueprint URL, editor, copy, download, run, validation, and result states
Run portability actions for GitHub import/export, ZIP import/download, database download, and Blueprint bundle downloads with visible transfer history
featureCoverage: Vanilla WordPress start route
WordPress PR preview route with PR number or URL
Gutenberg PR or branch preview route with validation, loading, result identity, and save/export unlock
GitHub import with account connection and non-persistent token warning
Blueprint URL runner with validation and replacement consequence
Import .zip with native chooser model, validation, and replacement warning
Blueprint gallery categories and search with honest representative subset of 43
Featured Blueprint shortcuts including Art Gallery, Coffee Shop, Feed Reader with the Friends Plugin, Gaming News, Non-profit Organization, and Personal Blog
Save in this browser with file-copy progress and browser slug identity
Save to a local directory with folder picker, cancellation, permission grant, folder identity, and reconnect consequence
Saved, local-directory, preview, and unsaved Playground rows
Open, manage, rename, delete warning, delete cancel, typed confirmation, delete progress, row removal, and active fallback
Current shell path input, refresh, Homepage, WP Admin, temporary/saved/local state, Save, and reset/reload consequences
Site Manager Settings, Files, Blueprint, Database, Logs, Export to GitHub, and Download as zip
Files create file, create folder, upload, browse files, selected wp-config.php editor, dirty state, save, and result state
Blueprint editor, Blueprint URL, copy link, download bundle, run, validation, warning, progress, and result state
SQLite-backed database driver, path, size, database download, Adminer, and phpMyAdmin
Playground, WordPress, and PHP logs with realistic PHP notice warning
GitHub import and export
ZIP import and ZIP download
Database download and Blueprint bundle portability actions
Transfer history for saves, PR previews, deletes, resets, file edits, Blueprint runs, database downloads, ZIP actions, and GitHub transfers
